q: Is the 'Attorney General' a 'Whole-time' counsel for the Government? / क्या महान्यायवादी सरकार के लिए 'पूर्णकालिक' वकील है?
o: No, he can do private practice (नहीं, वह निजी वकालत कर सकता है)
e:
1. Post-Mortem Logic: AG sarkari naukar (Govt servant) nahi mana jata. 
2. Restriction: Wo private practice kar sakta hai, par sarkar ke khilaaf case nahi lad sakta.

q: The 'Special Officer for Linguistic Minorities' (350B) submits report to? / भाषाई अल्पसंख्यकों का विशेष अधिकारी अपनी रिपोर्ट किसे देता है?
e:
1. Post-Mortem Logic: Samvidhanik bodies seedha President ko report karti hain. 
2. Path: President use Parliament ke dono Houses mein rakhwayega.

q: Can 'Election Commissioners' be re-appointed to other government offices? / क्या चुनाव आयुक्तों को अन्य सरकारी पदों पर फिर से नियुक्त किया जा सकता है?
o: Yes, there is no constitutional bar (हाँ, संविधान में कोई रोक नहीं है)
e:
1. Post-Mortem Logic: UPSC ya CAG ke ulta, ECI ke members par retirement ke baad dusri naukri karne par koi 'Constitutional Bar' nahi hai. 
2. Criticism: Ise ECI ki independence ke liye ek khatra mana jata hai.

q: Which Article gives 'Constitutional Status' to the 'National Commission for SC'? / SC आयोग को 'संवैधानिक दर्जा' कौन सा अनुच्छेद देता है?
e:
1. Post-Mortem Logic: Article 17 untouchability khatam karta hai, par 'Body' 338 se banti hai. 
2. Link: Ye dono Articles milkar Dalito ke rights ko protect karte hain.

q: Who decides the 'Rules of Service' for staff of the State PSC (BPSC)? / BPSC के स्टाफ की सेवा के नियम कौन तय करता है?
e:
1. Post-Mortem Logic: Article 318 ke tehat Governor ko ye power di gayi hai. 
2. Scope: Isme staff ki ginti aur unki salary ke rules shamil hain.

q: Can the 'Finance Commission' recommend taxes for 'Municipalities'? / क्या वित्त आयोग 'नगर पालिकाओं' के लिए करों की सिफारिश कर सकता है?
o: Yes, under Article 280(3)(c) (हाँ, अनुच्छेद 280(3)(c) के तहत)
e:
1. Post-Mortem Logic: 74th Amendment ke baad ye add kiya gaya. 
2. Job: Central Finance Commission state ko batata hai ki Municipalities ka fund kaise badhayein.

q: The 'Finance Commission' can be re-constituted before 5 years. True or False? / क्या वित्त आयोग का गठन 5 साल से पहले किया जा सकता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Flexibility. 
2. Logic: Article 280 kehta hai 'at the expiration of every 5th year or earlier'. 
3. Extra Fact: Agar President ko lage toh wo 3 ya 4 saal mein bhi naya commission bana sakta hai.

q: Which Article of the Constitution establishes the 'Election Commission' of India? / संविधान का कौन सा अनुच्छेद भारत के 'निर्वाचन आयोग' की स्थापना करता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Apex Body for Elections. 
2. Logic: Article 324 ECI ko poore desh mein Parliament, State Assemblies, President aur VP ke elections karwane ki 'Sovereign' power deta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Ye poore India ke liye ek hi central body hai.

q: The CAG of India can be removed from his office in 'like manner' as? / भारत के CAG को किस तरह से उनके पद से हटाया जा सकता है?
o: A Judge of the Supreme Court (सुप्रीम कोर्ट के न्यायाधीश की तरह)
e:
1. Core Concept: Security of Tenure. 
2. Logic: CAG ko hatana aasan nahi hai. Use sirf Parliament ke dono houses mein 'Special Majority' pass karke hi hataya ja sakta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Article 148 ke tehat ye provision uski independence bachane ke liye hai.

q: Who is the Chairman of the 'Finance Commission'? / वित्त आयोग का अध्यक्ष कौन होता है?
o: A person having experience in Public Affairs (सार्वजनिक मामलों का अनुभव रखने वाला व्यक्ति)
e:
1. Core Concept: Eligibility Criteria. 
2. Logic: Samvidhan ke tehat Chairman 'Public Affairs' ka expert hona chahiye, aur baaki 4 members technical knowledge wale hone chahiye. 
3. Extra Fact: Inka chunaav President dwara har 5 saal mein kiya jata hai.

q: Under Article 338A, which body was created for the welfare of STs? / अनुच्छेद 338A के तहत STs के कल्याण के लिए कौन सा निकाय बनाया गया?
o: National Commission for ST (राष्ट्रीय अनुसूचित जनजाति आयोग)
e:
1. Core Concept: Specialized Protection. 
2. Logic: 89th Amendment (2003) se SC aur ST commission ko alag kar diya gaya tha taaki STs par zyada focus ho sake. 
3. Extra Fact: Isme ek Chairman, ek VC aur 3 members hote hain.

q: The 'Union Public Service Commission' (UPSC) is which type of body? / UPSC किस प्रकार का निकाय है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Direct Source from Constitution. 
2. Logic: Chunki Article 315 seedha UPSC banane ka nirdesh deta hai, isliye ye Constitutional body hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Ye Central Recruitment agency hai jo 'All India Services' chun-ti hai.

q: Who acts as the 'Advisory Body' to the President for the disqualification of a Member of Parliament? / सांसदों की अयोग्यता के लिए राष्ट्रपति के लिए 'सलाहकार निकाय' कौन है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Article 103. 
2. Logic: Agar kisi MP ki 'Qualification' par sawal uthe (except defection), toh President ko ECI ki rai leni padti hai aur wo rai 'Binding' hoti hai. 
3. Extra Fact: ECI election disputes mein semi-judicial role nibhata hai.

q: Which Constitutional Body is known as the 'Highest Law Officer' in India? / भारत का 'उच्चतम कानून अधिकारी' कौन सा संवैधानिक निकाय है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Government's Counsel. 
2. Logic: Article 76 ke tehat AG sarkar ko kanooni rai deta hai aur kisi bhi court mein sarkar ka paksh rakhta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Wo Parliament ki proceedings mein bol sakta hai par vote nahi de sakta.

q: The 'Advocate General' of Bihar is appointed by: / बिहार के 'महाधिवक्ता' की नियुक्ति किसके द्वारा की जाती है?
e:
1. Core Concept: State Law Officer. 
2. Logic: Article 165 ke tehat Governor hi ise appoint karta hai aur wo Governor ki marzi (pleasure) tak pad par rehta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Iski qualification ek HC judge ke barabar honi chahiye.

q: Which Article provides for 'Audit of Accounts of States' by the CAG? / कौन सा अनुच्छेद CAG द्वारा 'राज्यों के खातों के ऑडिट' का प्रावधान करता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Scope of Audit. 
2. Logic: 148 post banata hai, par 149 kehta hai ki CAG Centre aur States dono ke accounts ki jaanch karega. 
3. Extra Fact: Ye India ki 'Integrated' audit system ko darshata hai.

q: The 'Election Commission' has became a permanent multi-member body from which year? / चुनाव आयोग किस वर्ष से स्थायी रूप से बहु-सदस्यीय निकाय बन गया?
e:
1. Core Concept: Structural Evolution. 
2. Logic: Pehle ye single-member tha, par workload badhne par ise 1993 se 3-member (1 CEC + 2 ECs) kar diya gaya. 
3. Extra Fact: Teeno commissioners ki power aur salary barabar hoti hai.

q: Under Article 317, the removal of a UPSC member can be done after an inquiry by: / अनुच्छेद 317 के तहत UPSC सदस्य को किसकी जांच के बाद हटाया जा सकता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Judicial Oversight. 
2. Logic: President misbehaviour ke liye seedha nahi hata sakta, pehle SC jaanch karega aur report dega. 
3. Extra Fact: Agar SC 'Insolvency' (diwaliya) paye, toh President bina jaanch ke bhi hata sakta hai.

q: Which body is responsible for 'Delimitation' of constituencies every few years? / निर्वाचन क्षेत्रों के 'परिसीमन' के लिए कौन सा निकाय जिम्मेदार है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Redrawing Boundaries. 
2. Logic: Ise President banate hain aur iska head retired judge hota hai. ECI iske sath milkar kaam karta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Iske order ko kisi bhi court mein challenge nahi kiya ja sakta.

q: Article 151 deals with which function of the CAG? / अनुच्छेद 151 CAG के किस कार्य से संबंधित है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Final Reporting. 
2. Logic: CAG apni audit report President ko deta hai (Centre ke liye) aur Governor ko (State ke liye). 
3. Extra Fact: Ye report baad mein Public Accounts Committee check karti hai.

q: Who determines the 'number of members' in the State Public Service Commission (BPSC)? / BPSC में 'सदस्यों की संख्या' कौन तय करता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: State Autonomy. 
2. Logic: Article 318 ke tehat ye power Governor ke paas hai. 
3. Extra Fact: UPSC ke liye yahi power President ke paas hoti hai.

q: Can the 'Election Commission' disqualify an MLA for 'Office of Profit'? / क्या चुनाव आयोग 'लाभ के पद' के लिए विधायक को अयोग्य घोषित कर सकता है?
o: Only with Governor's order after ECI advice (ECI की सलाह पर राज्यपाल के आदेश से)
e:
1. Core Concept: Article 192. 
2. Logic: Governor ko ECI ki rai leni padti hai aur wo 'Binding' hoti hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Ye power Governor ke naam par execute hoti hai.

q: Which Amendment added the 'National Commission for OBC' to the Constitution? / किस संशोधन ने OBC आयोग को संविधान में जोड़ा?
e:
1. Core Concept: Article 338B. 
2. Logic: 2018 mein 102nd Amendment se NCBC ko constitutional body banaya gaya. 
3. Extra Fact: Isne SC aur ST commission ki tarah hi powers payi hain.

q: Who decides the 'Rules' for staff recruitment in the Election Commission? / चुनाव आयोग में स्टाफ भर्ती के नियम कौन तय करता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Administrative Control. 
2. Logic: Article 324(5) ke tehat President hi inki service conditions aur rules banata hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Halanki kaam karte waqt wo ECI ke under rehte hain.

q: Which Article provides for the 'Special Officer for Linguistic Minorities'? / भाषाई अल्पसंख्यकों के लिए विशेष अधिकारी का प्रावधान कौन सा अनुच्छेद करता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Protecting mother tongues. 
2. Logic: 7th Amendment (1956) se ise add kiya gaya taaki minorities ki bhasha bachi rahe. 
3. Extra Fact: Ye officer apni report President ko deta hai.

q: Is the 'Finance Commission' recommendations binding on the Government? / क्या वित्त आयोग की सिफारिशें सरकार पर बाध्यकारी हैं?
o: No, they are only advisory (नहीं, वे केवल सलाहकारी हैं)
e:
1. Core Concept: Non-binding Nature. 
2. Logic: Sarkar ise manne ke liye kanoonan majboor nahi hai, par tradition hai ki ise mana jata hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Iska role tax sharing mein 'Neutral Judge' jaisa hota hai.

q: The 'Joint State Public Service Commission' (JSPSC) is which type of body? / JSPSC किस प्रकार का निकाय है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Article 315(2). 
2. Logic: Halanki UPSC aur SPSC constitutional hain, par JSPSC Parliament ke kanoon (Act) se banta hai, isliye ye Statutory hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Do states milkar ise banwa sakte hain.

q: Who is the 'Custodian of Public Purse' at the State level? / राज्य स्तर पर 'सार्वजनिक धन का संरक्षक' कौन है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Uniformity in Audit. 
2. Logic: CAG akela aisa adhikari hai jo Centre aur State dono ke kharche check karta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Bihar sarkar ka audit bhi CAG ki team hi karti hai.

q: The 'Salary and Allowances' of the CEC are same as? / CEC का वेतन और भत्ते किसके समान होते हैं?
o: Judge of the Supreme Court (सुप्रीम कोर्ट के न्यायाधीश)
e:
1. Core Concept: Rank and Status. 
2. Logic: ECI ki independence ke liye use SC judge ke barabar suvidhayein di gayi hain. 
3. Extra Fact: Use hatane ka tarika bhi SC judge jaisa hi hai.

q: Article 150 gives the power to prescribe the 'Form of Accounts' to? / खातों के प्रारूप को निर्धारित करने की शक्ति किसे दी गई है?
o: President on advice of CAG (CAG की सलाह पर राष्ट्रपति)
e:
1. Core Concept: Administrative Power. 
2. Logic: CAG batata hai ki accounts kaise banein aur President use order deta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Ye data transparency ke liye zaroori hai.

q: Which Constitutional body identifies 'Backward Classes' for reservation under Article 340? / अनुच्छेद 340 के तहत आरक्षण के लिए 'पिछड़ी जातियों' की पहचान कौन सा निकाय करता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: OBC status. 
2. Logic: President is Article ke tehat commission banate hain (jaise Mandal Commission). 
3. Extra Fact: Ab Article 338B (NCBC) ise permanently handle karta hai.

q: Can a person who was a 'Member' of BPSC become Chairman of UPSC? / क्या BPSC का कोई सदस्य UPSC का अध्यक्ष बन सकता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Post-retirement growth. 
2. Logic: Article 319 ke tehat SPSC member UPSC ka Chairman ya member ban sakta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Par wo kisi dusri 'Normal Govt job' mein nahi ja sakta.

q: Article 280 requires the Finance Commission to recommend 'Grants-in-aid' to? / अनुच्छेद 280 वित्त आयोग को किसे 'सहायता अनुदान' की सिफारिश करने के लिए कहता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Revenue distribution. 
2. Logic: Tax sharing ke alawa sarkar jo extra paisa states ko deti hai, wo bhi FC tay karta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Isse pichde states (jaise Bihar) ko madad milti hai.

q: Who provides the 'Staff' to the State Election Commission in Bihar? / बिहार में राज्य चुनाव आयोग को 'कर्मचारी' कौन प्रदान करता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Article 243K(3). 
2. Logic: Panchayato ke election ke liye Governor hi SEC ko zaroori staff deta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Ye local body elections ke liye zaroori hai.

q: Which Article prohibits 'Discrimination' in inclusion in Electoral Rolls? / मतदाता सूची में शामिल करने में 'भेदभाव' पर कौन सा अनुच्छेद रोक लगाता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Secular Elections. 
2. Logic: Kisi ko dharam ya jaati ke adhar par vote dene se nahi roka ja sakta. 
3. Extra Fact: Article 326 'Right to Vote' (Age base) deta hai.

q: Can the 'Attorney General' speak in both Houses of Parliament? / क्या महान्यायवादी संसद के दोनों सदनों में बोल सकता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Special Privileges. 
2. Logic: Article 88 ke tehat AG sadasya nahi hote hue bhi dono Houses mein baith sakta aur bol sakta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Wo kisi Parliamentary committee ka member bhi ban sakta hai.

q: The 'Expenses' of the UPSC are charged on which fund? / UPSC के 'खर्च' किस निधि पर भारित होते हैं?
o: Consolidated Fund of India (भारत की संचित निधि)
e:
1. Core Concept: Article 322. 
2. Logic: UPSC ke kharche par Parliament mein vote nahi hota taaki wo bina pressure ke kaam karein. 
3. Extra Fact: SPSC (BPSC) ka kharch State fund par charged hota hai.

q: What is the rank of 'CAG' in the Table of Precedence? / वरीयता अनुक्रम में CAG का रैंक क्या है?
o: Equal to Judge of Supreme Court (SC न्यायाधीश के बराबर)
e:
1. Core Concept: Protocol status. 
2. Logic: CAG ka pad bahut uncha mana jata hai (Rank 9). 
3. Extra Fact: CJI ka rank 6 hai.

q: Which Article provides for the 'National Commission for SCs'? / SCs के लिए राष्ट्रीय आयोग का प्रावधान कौन सा अनुच्छेद करता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Institutional Safeguard. 
2. Logic: Ye commission Dalito ke adhikaaro par nazar rakhta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: 65th Amendment se ise multi-member body banaya gaya tha.

q: The 'Election Commission' has became multi-member in? / चुनाव आयोग बहु-सदस्यीय कब बना?
e:
1. Core Concept: History. 
2. Logic: Pehli baar 1989 mein age limit 21 se 18 hone par workload badha, tab ise 3 member kiya gaya. 
3. Extra Fact: Permanently ye 1993 se multi-member hai.

q: Under Article 324, who appoints 'Regional Commissioners'? / अनुच्छेद 324 के तहत 'क्षेत्रीय आयुक्तों' की नियुक्ति कौन करता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Expansion during elections. 
2. Logic: President hi ECI se pich kar elections ke waqt help ke liye Regional Commissioners appoint karta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Inka tenure President tay karta hai.

q: Who acts as the 'Advisory' on MLC election disputes in Bihar? / बिहार में MLC चुनाव विवादों पर सलाहकार कौन है?
e:
1. Core Concept: ECI Jurisdiction. 
2. Logic: Vidhan Parishad (MLC) ke elections bhi ECI hi karwata hai, isliye wahi decide karta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Article 324 ye poori power deta hai.

q: Which Constitutional body is called the 'Balancer of Fiscal Federalism'? / किस संवैधानिक निकाय को 'राजकोषीय संघवाद का संतुलनकर्ता' कहा जाता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Equitable Wealth Sharing. 
2. Logic: Ye Centre aur States ke beech tax aur grants ka balance banaye rakhta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Ye har 5 saal mein banaya jata hai.

q: Article 150 gives power to prescribe 'Accounting Forms' to? / खातों के प्रारूप निर्धारित करने की शक्ति किसे है?
o: President on advice of CAG (CAG की सलाह पर राष्ट्रपति)
e:
1. Core Concept: Standardized Accounting. 
2. Logic: CAG decide karta hai kaise records rakhe jayein aur President use force karta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Isse audit mein asani hoti hai.

q: Who is the 'Custodian' of the purity of Elections in India? / भारत में चुनावों की शुद्धता का 'अभिरक्षक' कौन है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Apex Election Authority. 
2. Logic: ECI hamesha 'Free and Fair' elections ensure karta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Ise Samvidhan ka 4th pillar bhi kaha jata hai (Democracy ke liye).

q: Which Article provides for the 'Salary and Allowances' of BPSC members? / BPSC सदस्यों के 'वेतन और भत्तों' का प्रावधान कौन सा अनुच्छेद करता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Financial Protection. 
2. Logic: Inka kharch State Consolidated Fund par charged hota hai taaki koi pressure na rahe. 
3. Extra Fact: UPSC ke liye yahi rule Centre fund par hota hai.

q: The 'Finance Commission' can be re-constituted before 5 years. True or False? / क्या वित्त आयोग का गठन 5 साल से पहले किया जा सकता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Flexibility. 
2. Logic: Article 280 kehta hai 'at the expiration of every 5th year or earlier'. 
3. Extra Fact: Agar President ko lage toh wo 3 ya 4 saal mein bhi naya commission bana sakta hai.

q: Which Article provides for 'Special Officer for STs' (before separate commission)? / STs के लिए 'विशेष अधिकारी' का प्रावधान (अलग आयोग से पहले) कौन सा अनुच्छेद करता था?
e:
1. Core Concept: History of Commissions. 
2. Logic: Pehle 338 mein hi SC aur ST dono ka officer hota tha. 
3. Extra Fact: Ab 338A ST ke liye bilkul alag hai.

q: Who decides the 'Tenure' of the Regional Election Commissioners? / क्षेत्रीय चुनाव आयुक्तों का 'कार्यकाल' कौन तय करता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Article 324(5). 
2. Logic: Samvidhan ne ye shakti President ko di hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Ye commissioners sirf elections ke waqt help ke liye aate hain.

q: What is the main power of 'Advocate General' in Bihar legislature? / बिहार विधानमंडल में महाधिवक्ता की मुख्य शक्ति क्या है?
o: To speak and participate (बोलना और भाग लेना)
e:
1. Core Concept: Privilege of Non-member. 
2. Logic: Wo sadasya nahi hai par use bolne aur baithne ka haq hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Wo vote nahi de sakta (Art 177).

q: The 'National Commission for OBC' was formed as a Statutory body in? / NCBC को वैधानिक निकाय के रूप में कब बनाया गया था? (History)
e:
1. Core Concept: History of NCBC. 
2. Logic: SC ke order ke baad 1993 mein kanoon banakar ise pehli baar banaya gaya. 
3. Extra Fact: Constitutional status ise 2018 mein mila.

q: Who acts as the 'Election Commission' for J&K elections currently? / वर्तमान में J&K चुनावों के लिए 'निर्वाचन आयोग' के रूप में कौन कार्य करता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Uniformity. 
2. Logic: Article 370 hatne ke baad ab saare bade elections ECI hi karwata hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Panchayato ka election SEC hi karwata hai.

q: Which Article deals with 'All India Services' (IAS/IPS)? / अखिल भारतीय सेवाओं से संबंधित कौन सा अनुच्छेद है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Federal Services. 
2. Logic: Rajya Sabha agar 2/3 bahumat se pass kare, toh Sansad nayi service bana sakti hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Filhal IAS, IPS aur IFoS hi All India Services hain.

q: Who is the 'Highest Law Officer' in India? / भारत का 'उच्चतम कानून अधिकारी' कौन है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Apex Law Post. 
2. Logic: Article 76 ke tehat AG hi desh ka sabse bada vakeel hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Use wahi qualification chahiye jo ek SC judge ko.

q: The 'Election Commission' can remove 'CEC' only by? / चुनाव आयोग CEC को केवल किसके द्वारा हटा सकता है?
o: Parliamentary process like SC Judge (SC जज की तरह संसदीय प्रक्रिया)
e:
1. Core Concept: Security of CEC. 
2. Logic: Use hatana bahut mushkil hai taaki wo bina dar ke kaam kare. 
3. Extra Fact: Baaki ECs ko CEC ki sifaarish par President hata sakta hai.

q: Which Article provides for the 'UPSC' and 'SPSC'? / UPSC और SPSC का प्रावधान कौन सा अनुच्छेद करता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Founding Articles. 
2. Logic: Article 315 mukhya base hai recruitement commissions ka. 
3. Extra Fact: Inka kaam merit-based selection hai.

q: The 'Finance Commission' report is submitted to? / वित्त आयोग की रिपोर्ट किसे सौंपी जाती है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Constitutional Procedure. 
2. Logic: Article 281 ke tehat President ise dono houses mein rakhwayega. 
3. Extra Fact: Iske sath 'Action Taken Report' bhi lagti hai.

q: What is the retirement age of a Supreme Court judge? / सुप्रीम कोर्ट के न्यायाधीश की सेवानिवृत्ति की आयु क्या है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Constitutional Tenure. 
2. Logic: SC judge 65 saal tak pad par rehte hain. 
3. Extra Fact: High Court ke judges ki retirement age 62 saal hoti hai, ise 65 karne ka bill aksar charcha mein rehta hai.

q: Which Article provides for the 'Advisory Jurisdiction' of the Supreme Court? / कौन सा अनुच्छेद सुप्रीम कोर्ट के 'परामर्शदात्री क्षेत्राधिकार' का प्रावधान करता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: President seeking advice. 
2. Logic: Rashtrapati kisi kanooni sawal par SC ki rai maang sakte hain. 
3. Extra Fact: SC rai dene ke liye majboor nahi hai, aur Rashtrapati us rai ko manne ke liye majboor nahi hain.

q: What is the 'Original Jurisdiction' of the Supreme Court under Article 131? / अनुच्छेद 131 के तहत सुप्रीम कोर्ट का 'मूल क्षेत्राधिकार' क्या है?
o: Disputes between Centre and States (केंद्र और राज्यों के बीच विवाद)
e:
1. Core Concept: Direct entry to SC. 
2. Logic: Agar do states (jaise Bihar aur UP) ya Centre aur State ke beech jhagda ho, toh wo sidha SC jata hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Isme interstate water disputes (nadi jal vivad) shamil nahi hote.

q: The power of 'Judicial Review' in India is based on: / भारत में 'न्यायिक समीक्षा' की शक्ति किस पर आधारित है?
o: Procedure established by law (कानून द्वारा स्थापित प्रक्रिया)
e:
1. Core Concept: Checking validity of laws. 
2. Logic: Article 13 aur Article 21 ke tehat Court check karta hai ki kanoon Samvidhan ke hisab se bana hai ya nahi. 
3. Extra Fact: Japan se 'Procedure established by law' liya gaya tha, par Maneka Gandhi case ke baad SC 'Due process' bhi follow karta hai.

q: Who appoints the 'Chief Justice of India' (CJI)? / भारत के मुख्य न्यायाधीश (CJI) की नियुक्ति कौन करता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Appointment process. 
2. Logic: President hi CJI aur baaki SC judges ko appoint karte hain. 
3. Extra Fact: Iske liye 'Collegium System' (5 senior-most judges ka group) ki sifaarish li jati hai.

q: What is 'Public Interest Litigation' (PIL)? / 'जनहित याचिका' (PIL) क्या है?
o: Case filed for public good by anyone (किसी के द्वारा जनहित में दायर मामला)
e:
1. Core Concept: Access to justice for poor. 
2. Logic: Agar kisi ke rights ka hanan ho raha hai aur wo court nahi ja sakta, toh koi bhi teesra insaan uske liye case kar sakta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Justice P.N. Bhagwati ko India mein PIL ka janak (Father of PIL) mana jata hai.

q: Which Article says that the Supreme Court is a 'Court of Record'? / कौन सा अनुच्छेद कहता है कि सुप्रीम कोर्ट एक 'अभिलेख न्यायालय' है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Court of Record. 
2. Logic: Iska matlab hai SC ke faisle future mein kanoon ki tarah use honge aur SC apni 'Contempt' (avmanna) ke liye saza de sakta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: High Court ke liye yahi power Article 215 mein hai.

q: By which process are Supreme Court judges removed? / सुप्रीम कोर्ट के न्यायाधीशों को किस प्रक्रिया द्वारा हटाया जाता है?
o: Impeachment-like process by Parliament (संसद द्वारा महाभियोग जैसी प्रक्रिया)
e:
1. Core Concept: Judicial Independence. 
2. Logic: Unhe hatana bahut mushkil hai. Dono houses mein 'Special Majority' se resolution pass hona zaroori hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Ground sirf 'Proved Misbehaviour' ya 'Incapacity' ho sakta hai.

q: Who was the first female judge of the Supreme Court of India? / भारत के उच्चतम न्यायालय की पहली महिला न्यायाधीश कौन थीं?
e:
1. Core Concept: Judicial History. 
2. Logic: M. Fathima Beevi 1989 mein pehli female SC judge bani thin. 
3. Extra Fact: Leila Seth kisi High Court (Himachal) ki pehli female Chief Justice thin.

q: Article 141 states that the law declared by Supreme Court is: / अनुच्छेद 141 कहता है कि सुप्रीम कोर्ट द्वारा घोषित कानून है:
o: Binding on all courts in India (भारत के सभी न्यायालयों पर बाध्यकारी)
e:
1. Core Concept: Judicial Precedent. 
2. Logic: SC ne jo keh diya, wo poore desh ki har chhoti-badi adalat ko manna hi padega. 
3. Extra Fact: Ye India ki 'Integrated Judiciary' ko dikhata hai.

q: What is 'Curative Petition'? / 'क्यूरेटिव पिटीशन' (उपचारात्मक याचिका) क्या है?
o: Last legal resort after Review Petition (पुनर्विचार याचिका के बाद अंतिम कानूनी उपाय)
e:
1. Core Concept: Avoiding injustice. 
2. Logic: Review petition radd hone ke baad bhi agar koi badi galti reh gayi ho, toh Curative petition lagayi jati hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Ye concept 'Rupa Ashok Hurra vs Ashok Hurra' (2002) case se aaya.

q: Under which Article can SC grant 'Special Leave Petition' (SLP)? / किस अनुच्छेद के तहत SC 'विशेष अनुमति याचिका' (SLP) स्वीकार कर सकता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Residual Power. 
2. Logic: SC kisi bhi court ya tribunal ke faisle ke khilaaf appeal sunne ki ijazat de sakta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Ye SC ki discretionary (vivekadhin) power hai, nagrik ka adhikar nahi.

q: Who is the 'Guardian of the Constitution'? / 'संविधान का संरक्षक' कौन है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Constitutional Protection. 
2. Logic: Agar koi Samvidhan ke khilaaf kanoon banata hai, toh SC use radd karke Samvidhan ki raksha karta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: SC ko 'Final Interpreter' (antim vyakhyakar) bhi kehte hain.

q: Where is the High Court of Bihar located? / बिहार का उच्च न्यायालय कहाँ स्थित है?
e:
1. Core Concept: State Judiciary. 
2. Logic: Patna High Court ki sthapna 1916 mein hui thi. 
3. Extra Fact: Iski building 'Baroque' style mein bani hai.

q: Which Article gives High Courts the power to issue 'Writs'? / कौन सा अनुच्छेद उच्च न्यायालयों को 'रिट' जारी करने की शक्ति देता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Writ Jurisdiction. 
2. Logic: Article 32 sirf SC ke liye hai, par 226 HC ko power deta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: HC ki writ power SC se badi hai kyunki wo FR ke alawa normal legal rights par bhi writ de sakte hain.

q: What is the minimum qualification to be a Supreme Court judge? / सुप्रीम कोर्ट का जज बनने के लिए न्यूनतम योग्यता क्या है?
o: 10 years experience as HC judge (HC में 5 वर्ष का अनुभव)
10 years as advocate in HC (HC में 10 वर्ष वकालत)
All of the above (Any one condition)
e:
1. Core Concept: Eligibility. 
2. Logic: Ya toh 5 saal judge rahe hon, ya 10 saal vakeel, ya Rashtrapati ki nazar mein bade kanoon-vid hon. 
3. Extra Fact: Samvidhan mein SC judge ke liye koi 'Minimum Age' nahi likhi hai.

q: The 'Collegium System' is related to: / 'कॉलेजियम प्रणाली' किससे संबंधित है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Selection of Judges. 
2. Logic: Isme SC ke 5 senior judges milkar naye judges ke naam sarkar ko bhejte hain. 
3. Extra Fact: Ye system 'Three Judges Cases' ke baad develop hua, Samvidhan mein nahi tha.

q: Article 142 gives the Supreme Court power to: / अनुच्छेद 142 सुप्रीम कोर्ट को क्या शक्ति देता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Extraordinary Power. 
2. Logic: Jab kisi maamle mein kanoon silent ho, toh SC apni marzi se nyay karne ke liye koi bhi order de sakta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Ram Mandir case mein isi Article ka use hua tha.

q: Who can increase the 'Number of Judges' in the Supreme Court? / सुप्रीम कोर्ट में 'न्यायाधीशों की संख्या' कौन बढ़ा सकता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Legislative control. 
2. Logic: Article 124 kehta hai ki Sansad kanoon banakar judges ki ginti badha sakti hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Filhal SC mein 34 judges (33 + 1 CJI) hain.

q: High Court judges submit their resignation to? / हाई कोर्ट के न्यायाधीश अपना इस्तीफा किसे सौंपते हैं?
e:
1. Core Concept: Appointment vs Resignation. 
2. Logic: Bhale hi wo state mein kaam karein, par unhe appoint President karta hai, isliye resignation bhi wahi jata hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Unhe hatane ki process bhi Parliament mein hi chalti hai.

q: What is the 'Subordinate Judiciary'? / 'अधीनस्थ न्यायपालिका' क्या है?
o: District and Session Courts (जिला और सत्र न्यायालय)
e:
1. Core Concept: Lower Courts. 
2. Logic: HC ke niche aane wale District aur Taluka courts ko subordinate kehte hain. 
3. Extra Fact: District Judge ki appointment Governor karta hai HC ki salah se.

q: Which High Court has jurisdiction over the largest number of States? / किस उच्च न्यायालय का क्षेत्राधिकार सबसे अधिक राज्यों पर है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Common High Court. 
2. Logic: Pehle Guwahati HC 7 states ke liye tha, ab ye 4 states (Assam, Nagaland, Mizoram, Arunachal) ko cover karta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Article 231 Sansad ko power deta hai do states ke liye ek HC banane ki.

q: Can a retired Supreme Court judge practice law in any court? / क्या सुप्रीम कोर्ट का सेवानिवृत्त न्यायाधीश किसी न्यायालय में वकालat कर सकता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Post-retirement restriction. 
2. Logic: Independence banaye rakhne ke liye unpar India ke kisi bhi court mein practice karne par rok hai. 
3. Extra Fact: High Court judge retire hone ke baad SC aur dusre HC mein practice kar sakta hai.

q: Which Article deals with the 'Salary of Judges'? / न्यायाधीशों के 'वेतन' से संबंधित कौन सा अनुच्छेद है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Financial Independence. 
2. Logic: Inki salary 'Consolidated Fund' par charged hoti hai, yani Parliament isse rok nahi sakti. 
3. Extra Fact: Salary sirf 'Financial Emergency' mein kam ho sakti hai.

q: What is 'Judicial Activism'? / 'न्यायिक सक्रियता' क्या है?
o: Courts proactively protecting rights (अदालतों द्वारा सक्रिय रूप से अधिकारों की रक्षा)
e:
1. Core Concept: Proactive Role. 
2. Logic: Jab Executive (sarkar) apna kaam thik se nahi karti, toh Court aage badhkar nirdesh deta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: PIL iska sabse bada tool hai.

q: Who was the first Chief Justice of India? / भारत के पहले मुख्य न्यायाधीश कौन थे?
e:
1. Core Concept: Historical Firsts. 
2. Logic: Harilal Jekisundas Kania 1950 mein pehle CJI bane. 
3. Extra Fact: Sabse lambe samay tak CJI rehne wale Y.V. Chandrachud hain.

q: The 'Acting Chief Justice' of SC is appointed by? / SC के 'कार्यकारी मुख्य न्यायाधीश' की नियुक्ति कौन करता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Temporary vacancy. 
2. Logic: Article 126 ke tehat agar CJI ka pad khali ho, toh President kisi bhi SC judge ko Acting CJI bana sakta hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Iske liye seniority ko hi mukhya adhaar banaya jata hai.

q: What is 'Ad-hoc Judge' in Supreme Court? / सुप्रीम कोर्ट में 'तदर्थ न्यायाधीश' (Ad-hoc Judge) क्या है?
o: Temporary judge for lack of quorum (कोरम की कमी के लिए अस्थायी न्यायाधीश)
e:
1. Core Concept: Quorum fulfillment. 
2. Logic: Agar SC ki baithak ke liye minimum judges (quorum) na hon, toh CJI President ki ijazat se HC judge ko bulata hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Ye sirf Supreme Court mein hota hai, HC mein nahi.

q: The High Court of Andaman & Nicobar Islands is located in? / अंडमान और निकोबार द्वीप समूह का उच्च न्यायालय कहाँ स्थित है?
e:
1. Core Concept: Extended Jurisdiction. 
2. Logic: Andaman Nicobar Kolkata High Court ke under aata hai. 
3. Extra Fact: Lakshadweep Kerala High Court ke under aata hai.

q: Who administers the 'Oath' to High Court judges? / हाई कोर्ट के न्यायाधीशों को 'शपथ' कौन दिलाता है?
e:
1. Core Concept: State-level ceremony. 
2. Logic: Appoint President karta hai, par state mein kaam karna hai isliye shapath Governor dilata hai. 
3. Extra Fact: SC judges ko shapath President dilata hai.
